creator: manas@bhatnagar.net.in
text:
Hi, thanks for the response.

The error repeats itself regularly, even when Gitlab is not in use.

This installation has been running since version 9 or 10 possibly and has been through several updates * upgrades. I have always followed the update/upgrade guides posted on https://gitlab.fechner.net/mfechner/Gitlab-docu/tree/master
